reference: HE WINKED AT HER AND MADE A SIGNIFICANT GESTURE AS HE SPOKE AND THEN INFORMED THE BLIND ARTIST HOW GRACIOUSLY ARSINOE HAD REMEMBERED HIM WHEN SHE HEARD OF THE REMEDY BY WHOSE AID MANY A WONDERFUL CURE OF BLIND EYES HAD BEEN MADE IN RHODES
text: He winked at her and made a significant gesture as he spoke, and then informed the blind artist how graciously Arsinoe had remembered him. When she heard of the remedy by whose aid many a wonderful cure of blind eye had been made in Rhodes.
